subject: [For Shuning's Approval] Internal Transfer - Shermaine Ang (SP14028) - Reg CB to SGBD team

content.answer:
HI Shuning,

We would like to seek your approval for Shermaine's transfer from Reg CB to
SG BD starting from *01 Jan 2026, *with double hatting arrangements
currently in place as aligned by both teams directly.



*The details are as follow:*

·       *Employee Name: *Shermaine Ang* (*SP14028)

·       *Current team:* Singapore > Shopee > Cross Border > SIP > Market >
Local

·       *Current Position: *Senior Associate, Regional CB

·       *Current scope:* Local SIP Market

·       *Current Reporting Manager: *Zhang Yu

·       *Performance Grades*: 2024 - NA; 2025 - prelim B grade as a first
yearer.


*New role details:*

·       *New team**: *Singapore > Shopee > Marketplace > Business
Development > Seller Management > Price Competitiveness

·       *New Role/Scope: *Price Competitiveness Commercial Projects team

·       *New Reporting Manager: *vanessa.hui@shopee.com

·       *Transfer Date**:* 01 Jan 2026

·       No immediate changes in rank and compensation


For your approval please, thank you

-- 

Best Regards,


Irene Ling Ailin

Shopee | People Team | Regional HRBP

Address: 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265


*Take a sneak peek at how #LifeatShopee is like at the Shopee HQ
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOU4FGfmHDo>!*

Morning Shuning,
